assessment.note: She disclosed fatigue from constant context switching and that she has been holding it in, which is a strong negative engagement signal; also reveals wellbeing strain worth probing next.

new_queue.label: Where things stand
new_queue.name: Before we get into specifics, what feels most worth talking through today?
new_queue.description: Safe opener that lets Elena set the agenda without priming a problem.

new_queue.label: What shifted underneath
new_queue.name: What do you think has shifted underneath that?
new_queue.description: Invites her interpretation of the change without forcing a diagnosis.

new_queue.label: Priority tradeoff
new_queue.name: What are you saying yes to and no to right now?
new_queue.description: Reveals the current priority tradeoffs created by the reorg.

new_queue.label: Support gap
new_queue.name: What support would actually take friction out of the next two weeks?
new_queue.description: Moves from concern to concrete support Elena can use immediately.

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks steadier for you?
new_queue.description: Designated closer that lands on immediate action and support.
